posts.title: Opendoor fires all Indian employees, closes Indian operations, brings jobs back to the U.S.

posts.author: rdvs34283
posts.title: SPLC May Be Stripped of Tax-Exempt Status After Fiery Congressional Hearing

link_metadata.description: The Southern Poverty Law Center (SPLC) is facing growing pressure from Capitol Hill after Rep. Chip Roy (R-TX) introduced legislation that would revoke the left-wing organization's tax-exempt status amid ongoing allegations that it secretly funded extremist groups while publicly claiming to combat them.
link_metadata.title: SPLC May Be Stripped of Tax-Exempt Status After Fiery Congressional Hearing - Slay News
